name: Frozen Pineapple Daiquiris
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Combine all ingredients, except lime slices and cherries, in a large bowl. Cover and freeze 8 hours. To serve, place frozen mixture in container of an electric blender; blend mixture until smooth. Garnish with lime slices and cherries, and serve immediately. Yield: 3 cups.
